name: Wire Pi Features
description: Connect all placeholder stores and components to actual Pi data. Wire ContextDial to Pi state, LogsTab to tool execution events, region tags to Pi tide_tags tool, model switching, and diff preview to the approval flow.
notes: All tasks in this phase require Pi to be available (agent login, model API).
This is the 'last mile' wiring that Phase 4 deferred.
After this phase, all UI components have real data backing them.
Phase 5 (Pi-independent polish) must be complete before starting.

tasks.title: Wire ContextDial to Pi get_state
tasks.description: Parse Pi's state response for session stats (token count, context window size, model info). Map to BudgetBreakdown format. Update contextStore.refreshBreakdown to call getPiState() and handle the state_update event in stream.ts. ContextDial renders real usage percentage.

tasks.title: Wire LogsTab to Pi tool execution events
tasks.description: In stream.ts, when handling tool_execution_start and tool_execution_end events, call logStore.addToolStart and logStore.completeToolLog. Enrich log entries with tool arguments and results from the event payload. LogsTab displays live tool execution history.

tasks.title: Wire Region Tags to Pi tide_tags tool
tasks.description: Update regionTagStore to persist tags by sending prompts to Pi that invoke the tide_tags tool. Extend tide-project.ts to support create/update/delete operations on tags.json (currently read-only). Tags persist across sessions via .tide/tags/tags.json.

tasks.title: Build Model Picker in Status Bar
tasks.description: ModelPicker.tsx component showing current model name in status bar with dropdown to switch. New Tauri command set_pi_model that sends set_model to Pi stdin. Pi's get_state response provides model info. Manual override persists for the session.

tasks.title: Wire Diff Preview to Approval Flow
tasks.description: Extend tide-safety.ts to read file content before a write/edit tool call and include it as originalContent in the ctx.ui.confirm() payload. The approval event carries both original and new content. ApprovalDialog (enhanced in TIDE-057) renders the real diff.
